revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:えびす神社]]
[[File:Nishinomiya-jinja01s4592.jpg|thumb|250px|{{ill|Nishinomiya Shrine|en|Nishinomiya Shrine|qid=Q705297|lt=Nishinomiya Shrine|1=Nishinomiya Shrine}}]] [[File:Miho-jinja_haiden.jpg|thumb|250px|{{ill|Miho Shrine|en|Miho Shrine|qid=Q3313076|lt=Miho Shrine|1=Miho Shrine}}]]
'''Ebisu Shrines''' (えびす神社) are {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}} dedicated to {{ill|Ebisu (mythology)|en|Ebisu (mythology)|qid=Q1129330|lt=Ebisu|1=Ebisu (mythology)}}, {{ill|Hiruko|ja|ヒルコ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko|1=Hiruko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1067028}}, or {{ill|Kotoshironushi|en|Kotoshironushi|qid=Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}. == Overview == Ebisu shrines are found throughout Japan and may be written as '''夷神社''', '''戎神社''', '''胡神社''', '''蛭子神社''', '''恵比須神社''', '''恵比寿神社''', '''恵美須神社''', or '''恵毘須神社'''. Even shrines whose official names do not contain "Ebisu" may be commonly referred to as "○○ Ebisu Shrine" if they enshrine Ebisu. In the {{ill|Kansai region|ja|関西|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansai region|1=Kansai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1111292}}, Ebisu is often affectionately called ''Ebbesan'' or ''Obessan.'' Some shrines named "Hiruko Shrine" (蛭子神社) are pronounced "Hiruko Jinja" instead of "Ebisu Jinja" because they specifically enshrine {{ill|Hiruko-no-Kami|ja|蛭子神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヒルコ|1=Hiruko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1067028}}. However, due to the syncretism and identification of Hiruko with Ebisu, some shrines enshrine Hiruko but are still called "Ebisu Shrine." Conversely, there are shrines named "Hiruko Shrine" that enshrine Kotoshironushi instead of Hiruko. == Notable Shrines ==
{{Referencesの明記|date=2011th year 11月|section=1|qq=}} === Hiruko Lineage === * {{ill|Hiruko Shrine|ja|蛭児神社 (霧島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Nishinomiya Shrine|en|Nishinomiya Shrine|qid=Q705297|lt=Nishinomiya Shrine|1=Nishinomiya Shrine}} ({{ill|Nishinomiya|en|Nishinomiya|qid=Q243853|lt=Nishinomiya|1=Nishinomiya}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}) – The head shrine of Ebisu shrines in the Hiruko lineage.<ref>{{Cite web|title=ゆっくり参拝、皆で「福男」500人が石畳歩く 開門ダッシュ２年連続中止|url=https://www.nikkansports.com/general/news/202201100000228.html|publisher=日刊スポーツ|date=2022-01-10|accessdate=2022-01-10|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Nishinomiya Shrine (Ashikaga)|ja|西宮神社 (足利市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishinomiya Shrine (Ashikaga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Ashikaga, Tochigi|en|Ashikaga, Tochigi|qid=Q374477|lt=Ashikaga|1=Ashikaga, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|qid=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Kiryū Nishinomiya Shrine|ja|桐生西宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiryū Nishinomiya Shrine|1=Kiryū Nishinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11537354}} ({{ill|Kiryū, Gunma|en|Kiryū, Gunma|qid=Q634022|lt=Kiryū|1=Kiryū, Gunma}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Hiruko Shrine (Kamakura)|ja|蛭子神社 (鎌倉市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko Shrine (Kamakura)|1=Hiruko Shrine (Kamakura)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q134927886}} ({{ill|Kamakura|en|Kamakura|qid=Q200267|lt=Kamakura|1=Kamakura}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Nishinomiya Shrine (Nagano City)|ja|西宮神社 (長野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishinomiya Shrine (Nagano City)|1=Nishinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q43594945}} ({{ill|Nagano (city)|en|Nagano (city)|qid=Q128849|lt=Nagano City|1=Nagano (city)}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Nishinomiya Shrine (Saku)|ja|西宮神社 (佐久市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishinomiya Shrine (Saku)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Saku, Nagano|en|Saku, Nagano|qid=Q495821|lt=Saku|1=Saku, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) – Also known as {{ill|Isonomiya Shrine|ja|夷社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonomiya Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Horikawa Ebisu Shrine|ja|堀川戎神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikawa Ebisu Shrine|1=Horikawa Ebisu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11427435}} ({{ill|Kita-ku, Osaka|en|Kita-ku, Osaka|qid=Q1207746|lt=Kita-ku, Osaka|1=Kita-ku, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|qid=Q35765|lt=Osaka|1=Osaka}}) * {{ill|Hiruko Senden|ja|蛭児遷殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko Senden|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Kita-ku, Osaka, Osaka Prefecture) – Located within the precincts of {{ill|Osaka Tenmangū|en|Osaka Tenmangū|qid=Q385793|lt=Osaka Tenmangū Shrine|1=Osaka Tenmangū}}. * {{ill|Ishizutajinja|ja|石津太神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishizutajinja|1=Iwatsuta Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11586779}} ({{ill|Nishi-ku, Sakai|en|Nishi-ku, Sakai|qid=Q1042499|lt=Nishi-ku, Sakai|1=Nishi-ku, Sakai}}, {{ill|Sakai|en|Sakai|qid=Q193428|lt=Sakai|1=Sakai}}, Osaka Prefecture) – Enshrines both Hiruko and {{ill|Kotoshironushi|en|Kotoshironushi|qid=Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}. * {{ill|Yanagihara Ebisu Shrine|ja|柳原蛭子神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagihara Ebisu Shrine|1=Yanagiwara Hiruko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11534157}} ({{ill|Hyōgo-ku, Kobe|en|Hyōgo-ku, Kobe|qid=Q1078790|lt=Hyōgo Ward, Kobe|1=Hyōgo-ku, Kobe}}, {{ill|Kobe|en|Kobe|qid=Q48320|lt=Kobe|1=Kobe}}, Hyōgo Prefecture) * {{ill|Nagoso Hiruko Shrine|ja|名古曽蛭子神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagoso Hiruko Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Hashimoto, Wakayama|en|Hashimoto, Wakayama|qid=Q842098|lt=Hashimoto, Wakayama|1=Hashimoto, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|qid=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Ebisu Shrine (Hiroshima)|ja|胡子神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu Shrine (Hiroshima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Naka-ku, Hiroshima|en|Naka-ku, Hiroshima|qid=Q63436|lt=Naka-ku, Hiroshima|1=Naka-ku, Hiroshima}}, {{ill|Hiroshima|en|Hiroshima|qid=Q34664|lt=Hiroshima|1=Hiroshima}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|en|Hiroshima Prefecture|qid=Q617375|lt=Hiroshima Prefecture|1=Hiroshima Prefecture}}) – Enshrines both Hiruko and Kotoshironushi. * {{ill|Hiruko Shrine (Naka, Tokushima)|ja|蛭子神社 (那賀町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko Shrine (Naka, Tokushima)|1=Hiruko Shrine (Q106852693)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q106852693}} ({{ill|Naka, Tokushima|en|Naka, Tokushima|qid=Q1205685|lt=Naka|1=Naka, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Naka District, Tokushima|en|Naka District, Tokushima|qid=Q1156492|lt=Naka District, Tokushima|1=Naka District, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}) === Kotoshironushi Lineage === * {{ill|Ōsaki Shrine|ja|大前神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōsaki Shrine|1=Ōsaki Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11433065}} ({{ill|Mooka, Tochigi|en|Mooka, Tochigi|qid=Q498060|lt=Moka|1=Mooka, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|qid=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Ōsaki Ebisu Shrine|ja|大前恵比寿神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōsaki Ebisu Shrine|1=Ōsaki Ebisu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11433058}} (Moka, Tochigi Prefecture) * {{ill|Miho Ōkuni Shrine (Takasaki)|ja|美保大国神社 (高崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miho Ōkuni Shrine (Takasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Takasaki|en|Takasaki|qid=Q336438|lt=Takasaki|1=Takasaki}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}) – A sub-shrine within {{ill|Takasaki Shrine|ja|高崎神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takasaki Shrine|1=Takasaki Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11669785}}, enshrining {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōkuninushi|1=Ōkuninushi}} alongside Kotoshironushi. * {{ill|Hannō Ebisu Shrine|ja|飯能恵比寿神社 (飯能市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannō Ebisu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Hannō|en|Hannō|qid=Q850472|lt=Hannō|1=Hannō}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}) – A sub-shrine within {{ill|Suwa Hachiman Shrine (Hannō)|ja|諏訪八幡神社 (飯能市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Hachiman Shrine (Hannō)|1=Suwa Hachiman Shrine (Hannō)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11631837}}. * {{ill|Ebisu Shrine (Shibuya)|ja|恵比寿神社 (渋谷区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu Shrine (Shibuya)|1=Ebisu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11492406}} ({{ill|Shibuya|en|Shibuya|qid=Q193638|lt=Shibuya|1=Shibuya}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}) – Located about 60 meters west of {{ill|Ebisu Station (Tokyo)|en|Ebisu Station (Tokyo)|qid=Q800715|lt=Ebisu Station|1=Ebisu Station (Tokyo)}}. Another shrine exists within {{ill|Yebisu Garden Place|ja|恵比寿ガーデンプレイス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yebisu Garden Place|1=Yebisu Garden Place|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11259433}}. * {{ill|Takara Ebisu Shrine|ja|宝田恵比寿神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takara Ebisu Shrine|1=Takarada Ebisu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q63148045}} ({{ill|Chūō, Tokyo|ja|中央区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūō, Tokyo|1=Chūōku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q20652290}}, Tokyo) – Known as the birthplace of {{ill|Bettarazuke|en|Bettarazuke|qid=Q527616|lt=Bettarazuke|1=Bettarazuke}}. Part of the Nihonbashi Seven Lucky Gods pilgrimage. * {{ill|Mishima Taisha|en|Mishima Taisha|qid=Q650772|lt=Mishima Taisha|1=Mishima Taisha}} ({{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|qid=Q653478|lt=Mishima|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Ebisu Shrine (Wakasa)|ja|恵比須神社 (若狭町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu Shrine (Wakasa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Wakasa, Fukui|en|Wakasa, Fukui|qid=Q1349039|lt=Wakasa|1=Wakasa, Fukui}}, {{ill|Mikatakaminaka District, Fukui|en|Mikatakaminaka District, Fukui|qid=Q1204541|lt=Mikata District|1=Mikatakaminaka District, Fukui}}, {{ill|Fukui Prefecture|en|Fukui Prefecture|qid=Q133879|lt=Fukui Prefecture|1=Fukui Prefecture}}) – Associated with {{ill|Sube Shrine|ja|須部神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sube Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, known as Wakasa Ebisu. * {{ill|Hiruko Shrine (Nabari)|ja|蛭子神社 (名張市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko Shrine (Nabari)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Nabari, Mie|en|Nabari, Mie|qid=Q166183|lt=Nabari|1=Nabari, Mie}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|qid=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture|1=Mie Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Kyoto Ebisu Shrine|ja|京都ゑびす神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoto Ebisu Shrine|1=Kyoto Ebisu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q65248501}} ({{ill|Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto|en|Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto|qid=Q1203862|lt=Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto|1=Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Kitamuki Hiruko Shrine|ja|北向蛭子社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitamuki Hiruko Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto) – A sub-shrine of {{ill|Yasaka Shrine|en|Yasaka Shrine|qid=Q692714|lt=Yasaka Shrine|1=Yasaka Shrine}}. * {{ill|Hiruko Shrine (Ine)|ja|蛭子神社 (伊根町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko Shrine (Ine)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Ine, Kyoto|en|Ine, Kyoto|qid=Q1345614|lt=Ine|1=Ine, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Yosa District, Kyoto|en|Yosa District, Kyoto|qid=Q1078639|lt=Yosa District|1=Yosa District, Kyoto}}, Kyoto Prefecture) – Features three {{ill|whale tombs|ja|鯨墓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/whale tombs|1=grave of whales|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11674281}} within its grounds. * {{ill|Imamiya Ebisu Shrine|en|Imamiya Ebisu Shrine|qid=Q11376859|lt=Imamiya Ebisu Shrine|1=Imamiya Ebisu Shrine}} ({{ill|Naniwa-ku, Osaka|en|Naniwa-ku, Osaka|qid=Q861618|lt=Naniwa-ku, Osaka|1=Naniwa-ku, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|qid=Q35765|lt=Osaka|1=Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Noda Ebisu Shrine|ja|野田恵美須神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noda Ebisu Shrine|1=Noda-Ebisu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11645989}} ({{ill|Fukushima-ku, Osaka|en|Fukushima-ku, Osaka|qid=Q985728|lt=Fukushima-ku, Osaka|1=Fukushima-ku, Osaka}}, Osaka) – Listed in shrine records during the Meiji era as enshrining Kotoshironushi. * {{ill|Fuse Ebisu Shrine|ja|布施戎神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuse Ebisu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Higashiōsaka|en|Higashiōsaka|qid=Q243863|lt=Higashi-Osaka|1=Higashiōsaka}}, Osaka Prefecture) * {{ill|Sakai Ebisu Shrine|ja|堺戎神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Ebisu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Sakai-ku, Sakai|en|Sakai-ku, Sakai|qid=Q1042008|lt=Sakai-ku, Sakai|1=Sakai-ku, Sakai}}, Sakai, Osaka) – A sub-shrine of {{ill|Sugawara Shrine (Sakai)|ja|菅原神社 (堺市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara Shrine (Sakai)|1=Sugawara Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11619211}}. * {{ill|Ishizutajinja|ja|石津太神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishizutajinja|1=Iwatsuta Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11586779}} ({{ill|Nishi-ku, Sakai|en|Nishi-ku, Sakai|qid=Q1042499|lt=Nishi-ku, Sakai|1=Nishi-ku, Sakai}}, Sakai, Osaka) * {{ill|Ishizu Shrine|ja|石津神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishizu Shrine|1=Ishizu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11586788}} (Nishi-ku, Sakai, Osaka) – Considered among the oldest Ebisu shrines along with Ishizutajinja. * {{ill|Sumiyoshi Shrine (Neyagawa)|ja|住吉神社 (寝屋川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Shrine (Neyagawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Neyagawa, Osaka|en|Neyagawa, Osaka|qid=Q389633|lt=Neyagawa|1=Neyagawa, Osaka}}, Osaka Prefecture) – Also known as Neyagawa Ebisu Shrine. * {{ill|Amagasaki Ebisu Shrine|ja|尼崎戎神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amagasaki Ebisu Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Amagasaki|en|Amagasaki|qid=Q213318|lt=Amagasaki|1=Amagasaki}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Inazumehama Ebisu Shrine|ja|稲爪浜恵比須神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inazumehama Ebisu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Akashi, Hyōgo|en|Akashi, Hyōgo|qid=Q26406|lt=Akashi|1=Akashi, Hyōgo}}, Hyōgo Prefecture) – A sub-shrine of {{ill|Inazume Shrine|ja|稲爪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inazume Shrine|1=Inazume Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11596731}}. * {{ill|Akai Ebisu Shrine|ja|阿開恵美須神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akai Ebisu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Harima, Hyōgo|en|Harima, Hyōgo|qid=Q1155297|lt=Harima|1=Harima, Hyōgo}}, {{ill|Kako District, Hyōgo|en|Kako District, Hyōgo|qid=Q1042066|lt=Kako District|1=Kako District, Hyōgo}}, Hyōgo Prefecture) * {{ill|Minamiichi Ebisu Shrine|ja|南市恵毘須神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamiichi Ebisu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|qid=Q169134|lt=Nara|1=Nara (city)}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Miwa Ebisu Shrine|ja|三輪坐恵比須神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miwa Ebisu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|Sakurai, Nara|qid=Q127026|lt=Sakurai, Nara|1=Sakurai, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture) * {{ill|Miho Shrine|en|Miho Shrine|qid=Q3313076|lt=Miho Shrine|1=Miho Shrine}} ({{ill|Matsue|en|Matsue|qid=Q207321|lt=Matsue|1=Matsue}}, {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}}) – The head shrine for Kotoshironushi. * {{ill|Kotoshironushi Shrine (Tokushima)|ja|事代主神社 (徳島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotoshironushi Shrine (Tokushima)|1=Kotoshironushi Shrine (Tokushima)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11371125}} ({{ill|Tokushima (city)|en|Tokushima (city)|qid=Q207309|lt=Tokushima|1=Tokushima (city)}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Hiruko Shrine (Tokushima)|ja|蛭子神社 (徳島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiruko Shrine (Tokushima)|1=Ebisu Shrine (Tokushima)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11625590}} (Tokushima City, Tokushima Prefecture) * {{ill|Kotoshironushi Shrine (Naruto)|ja|事代主神社 (鳴門市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotoshironushi Shrine (Naruto)|qq=}} ({{ill|Naruto, Tokushima|en|Naruto, Tokushima|qid=Q460812|lt=Naruto|1=Naruto, Tokushima}}, Tokushima Prefecture) * {{ill|Ebisu Shrine (Naruto)|ja|恵比須神社 (鳴門市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu Shrine (Naruto)|qq=}} (Naruto, Tokushima Prefecture) * {{ill|Ebisu Shrine (Iyo)|ja|恵比須神社 (伊予市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu Shrine (Iyo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Iyo, Ehime|en|Iyo, Ehime|qid=Q838678|lt=Iyo|1=Iyo, Ehime}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|en|Ehime Prefecture|qid=Q123376|lt=Ehime Prefecture|1=Ehime Prefecture}}) – A sub-shrine within {{ill|Iyo Inari Shrine|ja|伊豫稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyo Inari Shrine|1=Iyo Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11380618}}. * {{ill|Wakamatsu Ebisu Shrine|ja|若松恵比須神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamatsu Ebisu Shrine|qq=}}
